def negative_pyproject_script_entrypoint_unresolved():
    rule_id = "pyproject_script_entrypoint_unresolved"
    family = "packaging"
    severity = "warning"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "pyproject script entrypoints that do not resolve to a locally indexed module callable."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
